html: Preventing A $5M Claim At A Major Western Canadian Events Campus
text: Preventing A $5M Claim At A Major Western Canadian Events Campus

html: From reactive repairs on 50-year-old infrastructure to predictive operations that hold premiums flat and unlock over $400K per year in utility savings.
text: From reactive repairs on 50-year-old infrastructure to predictive operations that hold premiums flat and unlock over $400K per year in utility savings.

html: Solution Provider: Novem Digital | Customer: A major Western Canadian events and entertainment campus with multi-building, aging infrastructure | Location: Western Canada | Asset: Multi-building events and entertainment campus
text: Solution Provider: Novem Digital | Customer: A major Western Canadian events and entertainment campus with multi-building, aging infrastructure | Location: Western Canada | Asset: Multi-building events and entertainment campus

html: BACKGROUND: Protecting An Iconic Campus With Aging Infrastructure
text: BACKGROUND: Protecting An Iconic Campus With Aging Infrastructure

html: A major events and entertainment campus hosts millions of visitors each year across multiple buildings, outdoor spaces, and attractions. Many core buildings are more than 50 years old, with the newest completed in 1970.
text: A major events and entertainment campus hosts millions of visitors each year across multiple buildings, outdoor spaces, and attractions. Many core buildings are more than 50 years old, with the newest completed in 1970.

html: The campus relied on manual inspections and reactive repairs. Traditional building automation systems followed a reactive operating model with limited ability to predict risk of failure in critical systems. Leadership faced a complex mix of aging equipment, deferred maintenance, and rising insurance and utility costs.
text: The campus relied on manual inspections and reactive repairs. Traditional building automation systems followed a reactive operating model with limited ability to predict risk of failure in critical systems. Leadership faced a complex mix of aging equipment, deferred maintenance, and rising insurance and utility costs.

html: THE CHALLENGE: Can Old Infrastructure Become Predictive Without A Full Replacement
text: THE CHALLENGE: Can Old Infrastructure Become Predictive Without A Full Replacement

html: Leadership needed to answer three urgent questions:
text: Leadership needed to answer three urgent questions:

html: Can we reduce property and personal injury claims
text: Can we reduce property and personal injury claims

html: Can we reduce unscheduled downtime of critical infrastructure
text: Can we reduce unscheduled downtime of critical infrastructure

html: Can we control utility costs and leak losses
text: Can we control utility costs and leak losses

html: Wholesale infrastructure replacement was not financially realistic. But continuing to operate blind meant absorbing preventable losses, emergency repair premiums, and volatile property insurance costs. Leadership needed proof that existing systems still had useful life if they could make invisible risk visible.
text: Wholesale infrastructure replacement was not financially realistic. But continuing to operate blind meant absorbing preventable losses, emergency repair premiums, and volatile property insurance costs. Leadership needed proof that existing systems still had useful life if they could make invisible risk visible.

html: THE SOLUTION: Layering A Digital Risk Platform On Existing Systems
text: THE SOLUTION: Layering A Digital Risk Platform On Existing Systems

html: The organization partnered with Novem Digital to deploy a digital risk platform across its highest-value, highest-risk assets without ripping out existing systems.
text: The organization partnered with Novem Digital to deploy a digital risk platform across its highest-value, highest-risk assets without ripping out existing systems.

html: Instrumenting Critical Systems
text: Instrumenting Critical Systems

html: Novem and the campus team focused on:
text: Novem and the campus team focused on:

html: Vibration and condition monitoring on pumps and motors in the ice-making plant
text: Vibration and condition monitoring on pumps and motors in the ice-making plant

html: Water leak and flow detection at high-risk locations
text: Water leak and flow detection at high-risk locations

html: Natural gas leak detection via a seismic shut-off valve and associated monitoring
text: Natural gas leak detection via a seismic shut-off valve and associated monitoring

html: Real-time decibel monitoring across outdoor event spaces
text: Real-time decibel monitoring across outdoor event spaces

html: Temperature, door, and motor status sensors on walk-in coolers
text: Temperature, door, and motor status sensors on walk-in coolers

html: In parallel, the campus modernized lighting, replacing thousands of aging fixtures with high-efficiency programmable lights, reducing fire risk and cutting electrical use by approximately 30%.
text: In parallel, the campus modernized lighting, replacing thousands of aging fixtures with high-efficiency programmable lights, reducing fire risk and cutting electrical use by approximately 30%.

html: Continuous Monitoring Of What Matters Most
text: Continuous Monitoring Of What Matters Most

html: The Novem platform continuously monitored the condition of critical mechanical systems, water flow, and sound levels across the campus. Maintenance staff received early warnings when equipment entered distress, allowing planned interventions during normal hours instead of emergency repair calls at premium rates.
text: The Novem platform continuously monitored the condition of critical mechanical systems, water flow, and sound levels across the campus. Maintenance staff received early warnings when equipment entered distress, allowing planned interventions during normal hours instead of emergency repair calls at premium rates.

html: Event managers gained access to real-time noise profiles so they could adjust sound levels during events instead of waiting for complaints. Integrated lightning detection improved public and staff safety during outdoor events.
text: Event managers gained access to real-time noise profiles so they could adjust sound levels during events instead of waiting for complaints. Integrated lightning detection improved public and staff safety during outdoor events.

html: Predictive Intelligence That Prevents Losses
text: Predictive Intelligence That Prevents Losses

html: The platform did more than monitor. It predicted failures. Vibration monitoring on a key motor in the ice-making plant identified early signs of failure and triggered a preventive maintenance intervention. That single event prevented a maximum probable loss estimated up to $5M in property damage, business interruption, and future premium impact.
text: The platform did more than monitor. It predicted failures. Vibration monitoring on a key motor in the ice-making plant identified early signs of failure and triggered a preventive maintenance intervention. That single event prevented a maximum probable loss estimated up to $5M in property damage, business interruption, and future premium impact.

html: A natural gas leak worth more than $400K per year was discovered and resolved after the installation of a seismic shut-off valve as part of the broader digital risk program. Underground water leaks were detected and mitigated, saving over 10,000 liters since baseline.
text: A natural gas leak worth more than $400K per year was discovered and resolved after the installation of a seismic shut-off valve as part of the broader digital risk program. Underground water leaks were detected and mitigated, saving over 10,000 liters since baseline.

html: BY THE NUMBERS: The Impact
text: BY THE NUMBERS: The Impact

html: Key outcomes across the campus:
text: Key outcomes across the campus:

html: Up to $5M maximum probable insurance claim prevented through predictive maintenance on ice-making equipment
text: Up to $5M maximum probable insurance claim prevented through predictive maintenance on ice-making equipment

html: 0% annual increase in property insurance premiums despite broader market inflation
text: 0% annual increase in property insurance premiums despite broader market inflation

html: Over $400K per year in natural gas losses identified and recovered
text: Over $400K per year in natural gas losses identified and recovered

html: More than 10,000 liters of water leaks detected and resolved
text: More than 10,000 liters of water leaks detected and resolved

html: Approximately 30% reduction in electrical use from lighting modernization, with a 4.5 year payback on the lighting project, excluding insurance benefits
text: Approximately 30% reduction in electrical use from lighting modernization, with a 4.5 year payback on the lighting project, excluding insurance benefits

html: WHAT THE NUMBERS MEAN
text: WHAT THE NUMBERS MEAN

html: These results allowed the organization to shift funding from emergency repairs and unplanned losses into capital planning, visitor experience improvements, and staff support. Insurance partners saw measurable risk reduction, which strengthened underwriting confidence and created a foundation for future risk-adjusted pricing.
text: These results allowed the organization to shift funding from emergency repairs and unplanned losses into capital planning, visitor experience improvements, and staff support. Insurance partners saw measurable risk reduction, which strengthened underwriting confidence and created a foundation for future risk-adjusted pricing.

html: By treating insurance as a controllable cost, leadership demonstrated that aging infrastructure can achieve predictable Total Cost of Risk Ownership. Predictive operations also improved cash flow visibility, making long-term capital decisions easier to defend.
text: By treating insurance as a controllable cost, leadership demonstrated that aging infrastructure can achieve predictable Total Cost of Risk Ownership. Predictive operations also improved cash flow visibility, making long-term capital decisions easier to defend.

html: The campus is explicitly monetizing data. Sensor data on vibration, gas, water, sound, and energy now supports claim prevention, premium control, and ESG reporting, turning operational data into a financial asset that pays for itself through avoided losses and improved terms.
text: The campus is explicitly monetizing data. Sensor data on vibration, gas, water, sound, and energy now supports claim prevention, premium control, and ESG reporting, turning operational data into a financial asset that pays for itself through avoided losses and improved terms.

html: THE BREAKTHROUGH MOMENT: Discovering The Invisible $400K Leak
text: THE BREAKTHROUGH MOMENT: Discovering The Invisible $400K Leak

html: The installation of a seismic shut-off valve revealed a major natural gas leak that had gone undetected for years, valued at more than $400K per year.
text: The installation of a seismic shut-off valve revealed a major natural gas leak that had gone undetected for years, valued at more than $400K per year.

html: In previous years, that leak would have continued indefinitely, hidden inside aggregate utility bills. Once monitoring exposed the anomaly, the organization could quantify, fix, and verify the improvement. That single discovery effectively paid for the system and validated the entire digital risk strategy.
text: In previous years, that leak would have continued indefinitely, hidden inside aggregate utility bills. Once monitoring exposed the anomaly, the organization could quantify, fix, and verify the improvement. That single discovery effectively paid for the system and validated the entire digital risk strategy.

html: THE TRANSFORMATION: Life Improves For Visitors, Staff, And The Community
text: THE TRANSFORMATION: Life Improves For Visitors, Staff, And The Community

html: For visitors: Upgraded lighting and real-time monitoring directly support public safety. Visitors benefit from better visibility, reduced fire risk, and assurance that the campus monitors weather and environmental conditions during outdoor events.
text: For visitors: Upgraded lighting and real-time monitoring directly support public safety. Visitors benefit from better visibility, reduced fire risk, and assurance that the campus monitors weather and environmental conditions during outdoor events.

html: For staff and operations: Maintenance teams moved from constant firefighting to a more predictable workload. They can act on early warnings, schedule repairs during planned downtime, and rely on data rather than assumptions.
text: For staff and operations: Maintenance teams moved from constant firefighting to a more predictable workload. They can act on early warnings, schedule repairs during planned downtime, and rely on data rather than assumptions.

html: For the community and regulators: Real-time decibel monitoring transformed relationships with the local municipality by providing transparent data that showed many complaints were tied to external traffic rather than events. Insurance partners now see a campus that actively manages risk, not just carries coverage.
text: For the community and regulators: Real-time decibel monitoring transformed relationships with the local municipality by providing transparent data that showed many complaints were tied to external traffic rather than events. Insurance partners now see a campus that actively manages risk, not just carries coverage.

html: LOOKING FORWARD: Fully Digitizing The Campus
text: LOOKING FORWARD: Fully Digitizing The Campus

html: The campus plans to expand Novem’s digital risk platform across all buildings to further improve capital planning, insurance positioning, and long-term operating costs. As more systems are instrumented, leadership will have a single source of truth for risk and performance across the portfolio.
text: The campus plans to expand Novem’s digital risk platform across all buildings to further improve capital planning, insurance positioning, and long-term operating costs. As more systems are instrumented, leadership will have a single source of truth for risk and performance across the portfolio.

text: CONFIDENTIALITY AND NDA

text: This case study is anonymized to protect customer confidentiality. Under NDA, Novem Digital can share full customer identity, underwriting evidence, and detailed financial and technical results with qualified insurers, lenders, and strategic partners.

html: ABOUT NOVEM DIGITAL
text: ABOUT NOVEM DIGITAL

html: Novem Digital is an AI powered digital risk platform that transforms operational data from real estate into measurable financial returns. Novem predicts and prevents equipment failures before they happen so leaders can reduce Total Cost of Risk Ownership, protect cash flow, and manage risk-related costs with confidence.
text: Novem Digital is an AI powered digital risk platform that transforms operational data from real estate into measurable financial returns.
